overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a forest trail at night during stormy weather. The character passes a group of NPCs and continues toward an open lakeside area, with the camera smoothly following from behind.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest dirt path with weapons on his back, moving through the dark wooded area

notable_agents.action: group of three armed bandits walking toward Geralt, passing by closely on the narrow path around the 22-second mark

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with visible gravel and patches of grass
tall white-barked birch trees lining the left side of the path
tall white-barked birch trees lining the right side of the path
dense green bushes and shrubs flanking the left side of the path
dense green bushes and shrubs flanking the right side of the path
dark overcast sky with storm clouds visible through gaps in the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. The path is flanked by birch trees and thick underbrush on both sides. Around the 22-second mark, a group of three armed NPCs approaches from the opposite direction and passes by closely before continuing on their way. The atmosphere is dark and moody with storm clouds visible overhead.

events.description: path opens up revealing lake water on the left as the dense forest gives way to shoreline

agents.ego_description: continuing along the widening path as the terrain opens up and vegetation becomes sparser approaching the water

entered.detail: grassy earthen slope rising on the left side of the widening path
grassy earthen slope rising on the right side of the widening path
dense forest visible on the horizon beyond the clearing

segments.scene_description: The trail gradually widens as Geralt leaves the dense forest behind. The birch trees and thick underbrush give way to more open terrain with grassy slopes on both sides. The path continues toward a distant tree line where the landscape begins to open up to reveal the lake.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy shoreline with the lake visible to the left, following the water's edge toward the distant horizon

entered.detail: calm dark water of the lake reflecting the night sky, occupying the left middle ground
expansive lake surface stretching to the distant shoreline under stormy skies
sandy and grassy mixed terrain forming a narrow beach path along the water's edge
grassy slope rising gently on the right side away from the water
far shore of the lake visible across the water with dark trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges onto a wide-open lakeside shore. The sandy path runs along the water's edge with the calm lake occupying the left side of the frame and grassy banks on the right. The stormy night sky is fully visible overhead as the character continues walking along the shoreline, with distant trees visible across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, storm-shrouded forest trail into a wide-open lakeside vista. It begins with Geralt navigating a narrow dirt path flanked by dense birch trees and thick underbrush under a moody, dark sky, passing a group of three armed NPCs who move in the opposite direction. As the character progresses, the dense foliage gradually recedes and the trail widens, shifting the environment toward open grassy slopes. The scene then expands as the forest gives way entirely, leading Geralt onto a sandy shoreline where the landscape opens up to reveal a calm lake on the left and grassy banks on the right. Finally, the camera continues along the water's edge under the full expanse of the stormy night sky, with distant trees visible across the horizon.
